items.caption: 7 easy ways to reduce visual clutter at home! #home #homeorganization #declutter #clutter #adhd
items.transcript: Here's some ways to reduce visual clutter, starting with bananas. Why do they have to have so many stickers? Or maybe that's just me. Okay, if you've got a lot of surface clutter, trays will be your best friend. Creating contained drop zones will prevent visual overwhelm. A simple yet effective tool is to use an open basket to store hats and scarves. Sometimes that makeup bag can be a real clutter hotspot. Instead, consider storing your everyday makeup in a vanity organizer that fits perfectly in your medicine cabinet. And this will free up a lot of space on your counters. Use automatic soap dispensers that are free of loud packaging and labels. As a rule, try to display only the things that you find beautiful to look at. The more practical everyday items you can store away. And as you can see here, I do like to make my life easier by storing all-purpose cleaner close to where I need to use it. And speaking of really microscopic visual clutter, are you guys familiar with the eye level test? This is a very simple test of how clean a surface really is. And speaking of surfaces, for all the pet parents out there, I love to keep a lint roller handy, especially in the summer when Sweetie is in major shedding mode.

items.caption: Things to get rid of in your bedroom that are disrupting your peace #home #bedroom #homeorganization #declutter #tidy @therealreal
items.transcript: Here are some things that are disrupting the peace in your bedroom. Exercise equipment you don't use. If that bike never gets used, it just becomes a dumping ground for clothes that you don't wear. Will you help me declutter, sweetie? Accessories you no longer wear. Pay attention to those bits and bobs like purses, although definitely need that Aquaphor. Earrings you haven't worn in years. You can always sell these things on places like The RealReal or ThredUp. Random things that end up in your bedroom. I'm looking at you, receipts, gym bags, paperwork, or even random household items, which can clutter up your space. Bad lighting. Fluorescent lighting in your bedroom can disrupt sleep because it emits a blue light, which actually blocks melatonin. Instead, look for light bulbs that are warm white or soft white. Too many decorative pillows, which can end up just being a chore when it's time to go to bed. And now let's see if sweetie has learned her lesson with disrupting the piece of my furniture. Looks like she still has some ways to go.

items.caption: #ad Basic Floor Cleaning Tips featuring The Viral RinseClean Spin Mop from O-Cedar! @ocedarclean #floors #mop #OCedar #clean
items.transcript: This is your sign to officially learn how to mop your floors, featuring the viral rinse clean spin mop from Ocedar. All you have to do is fill up the tank with water. I love that it keeps clean and dirty water separate so your floors stay spotless as you mop. And for some extra cleaning power, I'm popping in some Pax floor cleaner. Then just dip the mop in the floor cleaner and spin. My first mopping tip is to start at the farthest wall and work your way backward towards an exit. This way, you won't step on your freshly mopped floors. Moving on to the living room, my second tip is to make sure you mop along the grain, and this way you'll hide any potential streaks. And these mop heads are washable, which means they're entirely reusable. And then cleanup is as easy as dumping that dirty water into the sink. This mop made my floors really nice and shiny. Ten out of ten, this rinse clean spin mop will leave you floored.
items.adapted_script: Écoute, c'est le moment d'arrêter de perdre ton temps avec un vieux seau pis une vadrouille qui sent le moisi. Tu sais pas comment faire briller tes planchers sans laisser traîner de l'eau partout ? On va te montrer comment c'est fait — pis spoiler alert, c'est moins compliqué que tu penses. La vraie trick, c'est de séparer l'eau sale de l'eau propre, pis de commencer par le mur le plus loin pour pas marcher sur du frais mopped. Mais honnêtement, pourquoi tu ferais ça toi-même quand tu pourrais appeler Ménagénie pis juste… relaxer?

These work in cold water, so I'm able to wash my lights and darks together. The laundry inspector has arrived, everything's looking good. And in the spirit of relaxing this summer, I'm doing my best approximation of file folding, and it doesn't have to look perfect, it just has to get done. But wait, the laundry inspector has arrived, and it would appear that Sweetie is also a fan of the lavender scent. items.caption: Should you really unplug everything before going on vacation? #home #homeorganization #vacation #hometips @dyson Also! My adorable top is from @pistolandlucy
items.transcript: Going on vacation? Here are some things to unplug before you unplug, starting with kitchen appliances like your blender, your coffee machine, and your air fryer. This will save you a lot of energy and protect against power surges. In your bathroom, it's also a good idea to unplug hair straighteners and hair dryers. In the living room, you can unplug fans and air purifiers. All of these actions will help you save energy and prevent an electrical fire. You can also easily switch off power strips, too. Hi, Stripey! However, I don't necessarily unplug lamps, modems and Wi-Fi routers, and AC units. Curious if you unplug anything before going on vacation?

items.caption: How to tell if your cat is happy! @prettylitter #prettylitter #cats #cat #home #litter
items.transcript: Here's how to tell if your cat is happy, featuring my cat Sweetie. They curl up like a shrimp, which means they're comfortable and ready for deep rest. Sorry Sweetie, didn't mean to wake you. They want to hang out with you and follow you from room to room. Time for bed Sweetie! They make biscuits. When your cat kneads blankets, pillows, or even you, it's a behavior they learned as kittens, and it's a sign they feel safe and relaxed. They have loose whiskers. When their whiskers fan out softly to the sides of their face, this means your cat is relaxed and content. Their litter box habits stay consistent. And that's all thanks to Sweetie's favorite litter, Pretty Litter. Sweetie can't get enough of Pretty Litter because it's lightweight, unscented, and the pebble-like silica crystals are comfortable on her sensitive paws. Check out Pretty Litter, which is now available on TikTok Shop.

items.caption: Adhd-friendly home organization tips! @slice_cuts #home #homeorganization #declutter #adhd #adhdtips
items.transcript: For all my ADHDers, here are some home organization hacks. Make everything one step away, so choose hooks instead of hangers and choose open bins instead of boxes with lids. Minimize subcategories, so instead of having black socks and white socks, just have socks. Keep items where you naturally use them, so instead of having a junk drawer of items, keep pens wherever you write, scissors wherever you use them. I like to keep them next to my tape for packages and phone chargers everywhere you tend to sit. Contain the clutter wherever you can. Every home has clutter hotspots, like your nightstand, so just place a tray or a basket where clutter naturally lands. For many people with ADHD, products that are out of sight are out of mind, so while these aren't the most attractive containers, having clear ones helps you remember to use the items.

items.caption: 5 decluttering habits that will change your life! #home #declutter #homeorganization #clutter #tidy
items.transcript: Here are five decluttering habits that will change your life, starting with the five-item wind-down rule. As the name suggests, put away exactly five random items before bed. Reducing visual clutter will give your home a really nice reset for the next day. Use a container or drawer as a boundary and not a suggestion. A drawer can only hold a fixed number of shirts before it jams. Instead, let a physical boundary dictate your maximum capacity. Look who's here! Hi, sweetie! Instead of asking yourself, should I keep this? Ask yourself, if I saw this at a store, would I buy it again today? Don't save anything for a special occasion. Light the nice candle. Otherwise, these items just become clutter. Create a maybe-someday box. Fill a box with items you're unsure about, and if you haven't thought about it in six months, donate the items in the box. And now it's time to try this jumbo dot cake I baked. Even sweetie wants to know if it's worth the hype.

items.caption: ADHD-Friendly Laundry tip featuring @ecoscleans ! #ad #laundrytip #ECOS #ADHDtips #laundry home
items.transcript: Can't stand laundry day? Here are some ADHD-friendly laundry tips featuring Ecos. These days, sorting my laundry is one too many steps, which means I wash my lights and darks together. Enter Ecos Oxo Bright, which is color-safe and keeps my whites white and my colors nice and bright. I add a few scoops directly to the drum, along with an Ecos plant-powered detergent sheet, which beats all that pouring and measuring which can be overwhelming to the ADHD brain. Personally, I love that it's made without dyes, phthalates, and parabens, so it's perfect for my sensitive skin. So I'll toss one in and then add my lights and darks, which makes laundry day as fuss-free as possible. And bonus points, I air-dry delicates to keep them from shrinking. So check out Ecos if you are looking to simplify your laundry routine.

items.caption: Overwhelmed with clutter? Ask yourself these 3 q’s!! #declutter #home #closet #homeorganization #clutter
items.transcript: If you're overwhelmed with clutter, here are three questions to ask yourself. Would I buy this again today? I bought this skort last summer, but if I saw it on the clothing rack at a store today, I'd walk right past it. Am I keeping this out of guilt? Was this an expensive item that you bought yourself or was it a gift? Does this fit who I am today? Maybe you wore a lot of crop tops at one point, but you haven't in a really long time. If your family and friends don't like crop tops, then don't be afraid to donate or sell them. Because remember, getting rid of clutter is making way for the version of who you are today and who you're becoming.
